name: Cherry Orange Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 pound dark sweet cherries, drained (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Place cut-up chicken in a large baking pan and pour melted butter over the chicken.
3. In a separate bowl, combine brown sugar, orange peel, ginger, and orange juice; blend well.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Bake for 45 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and add cherries.
7. Return to oven and bake an additional 30 minutes, or until chicken is golden brown and tender.
